description_long: This is a wall-mounted electric fan with a robust, industrial appearance, featuring a circular metal cage that encloses three wide, curved fan blades. The cage is constructed from intersecting metal bars forming a grid pattern, providing both protection and airflow. The fan is attached to a thick, rectangular mounting bracket that extends from a flat wall plate, ensuring stability and secure installation. The blades are set deep within the cage, and the central hub is solid and slightly raised. The entire object has a matte, metallic gray finish, giving it a utilitarian and durable look. No visible control panel or power cord is present, emphasizing its minimalist and functional design.
description: A wall-mounted electric fan with a sturdy metal cage and three wide blades, finished in matte gray. The design is industrial and protective, with a prominent mounting bracket.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the fan, the circular cage, and the thick mounting bracket attached to a flat wall plate.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three wide blades, the concentric and radial bars of the protective cage, and the central hub.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, emphasizing the thickness of the fan and the mounting structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the mounting bracket and the rear of the fan cage, with the wall plate fully visible.
attribute_blade_guard_design: The blade guard consists of intersecting metal bars forming a grid with concentric rings and radial spokes, providing strong protection and airflow.
